Package com.pallycon.widevinelibrary

Interface PallyconDrmSession.ProvisioningManager

  • Enclosing class:
    PallyconDrmSession
    public static interface PallyconDrmSession.ProvisioningManager
    Manages provisioning requests.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void onProvisionCompleted()
      Called by a session when it successfully completes a provisioning operation.
      void onProvisionError​(java.lang.Exception error, boolean thrownByExoMediaDrm)
      Called by a session when it fails to perform a provisioning operation.
      void provisionRequired​(PallyconDrmSession session)
      Called when a session requires provisioning.

    • Method Detail

      • provisionRequired

        void provisionRequired​(PallyconDrmSession session)
        Called when a session requires provisioning. The manager may call PallyconDrmSession.provision() to have this session perform the provisioning operation. The manager will call PallyconDrmSession.onProvisionCompleted() when provisioning has completed, or PallyconDrmSession.onProvisionError(java.lang.Exception, boolean) if provisioning fails.
        Parameters:
        session - The session.

      • onProvisionError

        void onProvisionError​(java.lang.Exception error,
                      boolean thrownByExoMediaDrm)
        Called by a session when it fails to perform a provisioning operation.
        Parameters:
        error - The error that occurred.
        thrownByExoMediaDrm - Whether the error originated in an ExoMediaDrm operation. False when the error originated in the provisioning request.

      • onProvisionCompleted

        void onProvisionCompleted()
        Called by a session when it successfully completes a provisioning operation.
